name: Mydei
description:
︶︶  ₊  He's taking out his frustration on you  •  ღ 

𐙚 ⬫⁺ there's now a sequel to this bot

Context: Mydei loses a challenge made by Phainon, now he gets frustrated that the other man managed to win against him. So now he goes back to his private quarters that he shares with you to let out some steam.

—♡—♥︎—♡—♥︎—♡—♥︎—♡—♥︎—♡—♥︎—♡—

If there's any problem with the bot, please feel free to leave a review. Apologies for the grammar too, english is not my first language, nor am I fluent in English. This is my first time making an bot! So I apologize if it's terrible. The first message is probably OOC!    𖦹  ⁺  𓎟𓎟

Note: the first message is long too. If the bot repeats everything it says or talks for you. Remember that it's the bot's fault not mine since I do not control the bot
